pipeline_status.poller: Quiet — 6 consecutive quiet polls, no changes detected on dome site. V51.0 stable with automated monitor.py/pull_data.py commits only.
pipeline_status.analyst: No pending changes to analyze. Threat level: NONE.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 67/67 WINs reviewed + 4/~25 sections reviewed (SEC-3.1 through SEC-3.5.4). Phase 1 ongoing. Latest: SEC-3.5.4 (globe values relabeled). Next: SEC-3.5.5 (hidden falsifications).

pipeline_health.integrity_false_positives: Two 'major' issues from integrity report (showTab('details') and href='#part4c') are FALSE POSITIVES — current HTML has no showTab('details') calls and id='part4c' exists at Part 4.6 heading. Recommend updating integrity agent prompt to grep current HTML before reporting.
pipeline_health.code_analysis_sync_gap: ISS-048: 65/67 WINs have curmudgeon-validated tags in review JSONs but wins.json shows 0/67 reviewed. Run: node build-scripts/sync-code-analysis.js --apply --workspace .
pipeline_health.under_covered_reviews: Digest reports 20 WINs marked processed but with 58 holes not tracked in open-issues.json. Running backfill-issues.js would create these entries.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes. Automated commits only (monitor.py ~2h, pull_data.py ~6h).

internal_issues.description: WIN-058 itself is undefined on dome's site — our review argues against our own interpretation, not the dome's actual claim.
internal_issues.suggested_patch: See patches file — rewrite detail_claim, detail_evidence, and detail_verdict_text to focus on post-hoc fitting of 0.9941 scale factor rather than 'convention not prediction' argument.

internal_issues.description: Cepheids misidentified as 'geometric' distance indicators — they are standard candles, not geometric indicators.
detail_claim mischaracterizes dome's actual claim (cross-equatorial improvement, not NH improvement).
Summary finding focuses on wrong metric (NH regression instead of cross-equatorial fit).

Garbled sentence in detail_evidence — 'contrast with CHAOS-7 and IGRF-13, which predict both poles from a single spherical harmonic expansion describing how two poles arise from its geometry' is grammatically broken (conflation of two sentences).
Finding text states 'Both stars ~130 ly away' — factually wrong. Polaris is ~433 ly, Sigma Octantis is ~294 ly. The ~130 figure has no basis.
Wrong DOI citation: DOI 10.1007/978-3-540-71031-4 resolves to 'Mathematical Methods in Electro-Magneto-Elasticity' (Bardzokas et al.), not an MT reference.
internal_issues.suggested_patch: DEFERRED: Need to identify correct MT reference DOI

internal_issues.description: Cross-reference error: WIN-011 detail_claim says 'Mohe (Tibet)' — Mohe is in Heilongjiang Province, far NE China, not Tibet.
internal_issues.suggested_patch: DEFERRED: Need to read WIN-011 to verify and craft patch

internal_issues.description: Value discrepancy: WIN-011 says '+15.7 μGal' but dome raw text says '-6.5 μGal' and Wang et al. paper says 7.0 ± 2.7 μGal.
internal_issues.suggested_patch: DEFERRED: Need to verify against source paper and fix

recommended_actions.action: Run backfill-issues.js to create 58 missing open-issues from under-covered curmudgeon reviews
Apply patches for WIN-058, WIN-055, WIN-057, WIN-053, WIN-033 from suggested-patches file
Run sync-code-analysis.js to populate 65+ WINs with curmudgeon-validated code_analysis tags
Fix integrity agent false positives — update prompt to grep current HTML before reporting broken anchors
Update 5 broken external links (CHAMP, GRACE, Apollo LRR, CUORE, CHIME/FRB)
